title: hieracium alpinum subsp. cleistogamum
intro: Hieracium alpinum subsp. cleistogamum, also known as the Alpine Hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Hieracium alpinum subsp. cleistogamum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and to alleviate various health conditions.
